message.content:
@startuml
participant "用户" as User
participant "ms-trade" as msTrade
participant "subscribe-service" as subscribeService
participant "ctl" as ctl
participant "payment-service" as paymentService
participant "cgw" as cgw
participant "payment" as payment
participant "upm" as upm
participant "public-service" as publicService
participant "product" as product
participant "subscribe" as subscribe
participant "charging" as charging
participant "order" as order
participant "proxy" as proxy
participant "campaign" as campaign

as wpPurchase "wpPurchase: 订单图书"

wpPurchase -> msTrade : purchaseObj: 订单图书
msTrade -> subscribeService : PurchaseObj 订单图书
subscribeService -> ctl : PurchaseObj 订单图书
ctl -> paymentService : PurchaseObj 订单图书
paymentService -> cgw : PurchaseObj 订单图书
cgw -> payment : PurchaseObj 订单图书
payment -> upm : PurchaseObj 订单图书
upm -> publicService : PurchaseObj 订单图书
publicService -> product : PurchaseObj 订单图书
product -> subscribe : PurchaseObj 订单图书
subscribe -> charging : PurchaseObj 订单图书
charging -> order : PurchaseObj 订单图书
order -> proxy : PurchaseObj 订单图书
proxy -> campaign : PurchaseObj 订单图书

as A1 "订单创建"
A1 -> subscribeService : itemService.batchSubscribe 订单图书
subscribeService -> itemService : itemService.batchSubscribe 返回订单图书
itemService -> itemService : itemService.batchSubscribe 返回订单图书
